user_query: What mediums does Nate use to play games?

selected_nodes.text: Nate plays the game Catan and loves it for its strategy of building settlements and trading resources.

selected_nodes.text: Nate joined in playing a board game at the convention with people who shared his interests and hit it off with them.
selected_nodes.reasoning: Describes Nate playing a board game, which is a type of gaming medium.

selected_nodes.text: Nate has been playing the game Cyberpunk 2077 nonstop recently and enjoys its futuristic setting and gameplay.

selected_nodes.text: Nate usually plays CS:GO but participated in a local Street Fighter tournament and discovered he is really good at it.
